title: Closer look at Mayor Adams' indictment and others in his orbit
text: 24/7 Live New York City New Jersey Long Island Northern Suburbs Connecticut Welcome, Mickey mickey@disney.com Manage MyDisney Account Log Out POLITICS Friday, November 22, 2024 9:49PM 7 On Your Side's Dan Krauth has the latest on an investigation into the Adams administration.
